channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Jerome Powell navigated pandemic, inflation and Trump
item.description: In eight years leading the Federal Reserve, Jerome Powell has steered the U.S. economy through major crises and unprecedented...

item.title: Trump expresses uncertainty over Taiwan arms deal after Xi call
item.description: President Trump said Friday he is unsure whether he will approve a planned $14 billion weapons package for Taiwan after discussing arms sales with Xi.

item.title: Tech CEOs summoned to Capitol Hill for June hearing, sources say
item.description: The CEOs of Meta, Alphabet, TikTok, and Snap have been invited back to Capitol Hill for a broad oversight hearing in June, Axios has learned.

item.title: House Ethics seeks reinforcements as misconduct investigations grow
item.description: The House Ethics Committee is facing one of its busiest periods in years as lawmakers deal with a growing number of misconduct allegations.
